summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MDM Mapping Tool MVP. Fixed critical SelectItem component bug that was causing React crashes. All core functionality working including file upload, matching engine, review workbench, and audit logging.

minor_bugs.impact: Cannot add new synonyms via API

ui_bugs.issue: Some navigation clicks intercepted by overlay elements

fixed_issues.issue: Empty string values causing React crashes
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Changed empty string values to 'all' with proper logic

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with KPI cards (Total Values, Auto-Mapped, Needs Review, Unmapped)
Sidebar navigation displays all menu items correctly
Upload page dropzone and column input functional
File upload API processes CSV successfully (8 values, 7 auto-mapped, 1 review)
Review workbench loads with data and filters work
Batch selection and results display properly
Audit log displays activity with working filters
Dashboard stats API returns all required fields
Confidence scoring and match type display
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix create synonym API endpoint (returns 500 error) and investigate navigation click interception issue
